'''Marfa Thorbin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].

==Biography==
Born on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], Marfa Thorbin attended an off-[[Planet/Legends|world]] [[University/Legends|university]], studying to become an aquatic [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenologist]] with the intention of exploring [[Ocean/Legends|oceanic]] planets. While at university, she met and fell in love with [[Kane Griggs]]. After several years they agreed to become married, and she went home to inform her parents. While there, she and her family were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction of Alderaan]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].
